project_id.description: Hetzner Cloud project ID. Required when multiple projects are configured.

server_type.description: Hetzner server type/SKU (e.g. cx23, cx32, cx52, cpx21)

location.description: Hetzner data center location (e.g. fsn1, nbg1, hel1). Overrides project default_location.

snapshot_name.description: Name of the Hetzner snapshot to use for VM provisioning. Overrides project snapshot_name.

network_mode.description: Network mode: 'public' allocates public IPv4/IPv6 (default), 'private' uses an existing VNet.

network_name.description: Name of the Hetzner private network to attach the server to. Required when network_mode is 'private'.
